task: I need to leave a quick note for the next person about a room that still needs attention, and I want it to be easy to read at a glance. Can you help me draft it so the important details are clear and in the right order?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — send me the room details, and I’ll put them into a short note in the right order.

I can make sure it includes:
- room number
- what still needs attention
- what’s already been done
- who was told
- anything urgent for the next person

If you want, I can keep it very plain and quick to read.

user_simulator.text: Room 214. Bedding changed, trash out, but bathroom still needs a full clean — tub ring, sink, and toilet. Missing towels restocked, coffee set up. Front desk already knows the room is not ready yet. No urgent damage, just needs a proper finish before it’s turned over.

turns.agent_response: Room 214 — Bedding changed, trash removed, and towels/coffee restocked. Bathroom still needs full cleaning: tub ring, sink, and toilet. Front desk already knows room is not ready yet. No urgent damage, just needs a proper finish before turn-over.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s good. Clean and easy to read. Room 214, all the important stuff is there in the right order.
